metadata.title: Panorama Interconnect Administrator’s Guide
metadata.description: The Interconnect plugin allows you to set up a Panorama Controller that manages up to 64 Panorama Nodes, so that you can streamline common configuration and policies across Panorama appliances and the managed firewalls on your network.
metadata.keywords: Strata, 1.1, Next-Generation Firewall, Panorama Interconnect Administrator’s Guide, Panorama Interconnect, Device Management, Panorama, Non-Cloud, PANW Yellow Theme, 1.1, Network Security

metadata.title: Synchronize the Panorama Node with the Panorama Controller
metadata.description:
Synchronize the device group and template stack configuration
on the Panorama™ Controller to push the configurations to the Panorama
Node configuration.
